subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Your letter was received, and regarding the matter about which you had inquired concerning that coastal region [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه رسید از جهتی که مامور بان شده سوال نموده بودید آن محل سواحل
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause
